attributes.description: Alerts when enqueue lock utilisation exceeds 85%. Precedes enqueue wait events and contention.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] Enqueue lock utilisation high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle enqueue lock utilisation high

### What fired
Enqueue locks utilisation exceeded 85%.

### Why it matters
Enqueues are Oracle's shared-resource locks. Near-limit usage correlates with enqueue waits and ORA errors.

### Triage
1. Identify top enqueue waits from ASH / AWR.

### Remediation
- Raise enqueue_resources.
- Address hot-row contention in the workload.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
// Enqueue locks usage and limit are in separate TSDB document groups; aggregate across time window
| STATS usage = MAX(oracledb.enqueue_locks.usage),
        limit_val = MAX(oracledb.enqueue_locks.limit)
        BY oracledb.instance.name, host.name
| WHERE limit_val > 0
// Utilisation > 85% precedes lock contention and enqueue wait events
// Adjust threshold to tune sensitivity
| EVAL utilisation_pct = ROUND(usage * 100.0 / limit_val, 1)
| WHERE utilisation_pct > 85
| SORT utilisation_pct DESC
